title: Senior Knowledge Graph Engineer / AI Architect
company_focus: Knowledge Graph and AI reasoning systems
description:
Job Title: Senior Knowledge Graph Engineer / AI Architect

Location: Remote, USA

Duration: 6 Months with possible extensions or conversion

Role Overview

Lead the design and deployment of intelligent systems using
Knowledge Graphs and AI reasoning. You'll architect scalable
solutions that combine semantic technologies with AI models
to enable advanced inference, decision support, and
autonomous agents.

Key Responsibilities

- Build and scale Knowledge Graphs (RDF, OWL, SPARQL, Neo4j).
- Integrate AI models for reasoning, enrichment, and search.
- Develop semantic pipelines (NLP, entity linking, ontology
  alignment).
- Lead technical strategy and mentor teams.
- Prototype LLM + graph systems for real-time applications.

Qualifications

- 7+ years in software/AI engineering; 3+ with Knowledge
  Graphs.
- Strong in semantic tech, graph DBs, hybrid AI, Python/Java.
- Experience with LLM tools (LangChain, CrewAI), reasoning
  engines.
- Excellent communication and leadership.

Bonus

- MS/PhD, experience with Drools, RDFox, or autonomous agents.
- Research or open-source contributions.

California Pay Range

$70—$80 USD

use_cases: Advanced inference and decision support systems
Autonomous agents powered by knowledge graphs and AI reasoning
Real-time applications combining LLMs with graph databases
Semantic search and enrichment using knowledge graphs
Knowledge-driven AI systems for intelligent decision-making
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an ai-first role because it directly involves
building LLM + graph systems, prototyping real-time
applications with LLMs, and developing autonomous agents.
The role requires hands-on experience with LLM tools like
LangChain and CrewAI, integrating AI models for reasoning
and implementing advanced inference systems.
